artPrompt: A defaced warning placard at the reservoir's edge, its words reduced to smudged illegible smears, a shadowy hand tossing scraps into bubbling murky-green sludge that rises eagerly with sickly bioluminescent glow, rusted pipes and mutant overgrowth hazing into a bruised stormy sky, drifting litter and ember-green motes, a tender ominous offering, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Feed the Thing
text:
Choose one —
• Roll a six-sided die. Put that many sludge counters distributed as you choose among creatures you control.
• Put three sludge counters on target creature you control.
(You are not supposed to feed it. You feed it anyway.)
flavorText: The sign by the water says DO NOT FEED. Somebody crossed it out and wrote MORE.
